evals.name: read-explain-refund
evals.prompt: Вот файл процесса возврата товара: return.bpmn. Объясни простыми словами, что в нем происходит: основной ход процесса, где принимаются решения и что будет, если товар не пройдет проверку или если проверка затянется.
evals.expected_output: Plain-language explanation in Russian covering: trigger (return requested), happy path (inspect -> refund), the decision (item intact? yes->refund, no->reject), and the timeout/escalation exception. Should read from summarize, not raw DI.
assertions: Names the process trigger (return/refund requested)
Describes the happy path: inspect item, then issue refund
States the decision 'Item intact?' with both outcomes (refund if intact, reject if not)
Explains the 7-day timeout that leads to escalation
Mentions all three end states: refunded, rejected, escalated
Plain-language Russian prose, not a raw XML/DI dump

evals.name: create-vacation-approval
evals.prompt: Сделай BPMN-схему процесса согласования заявки на отпуск: сотрудник подает заявку, руководитель одобряет или отклоняет. Если одобрено - HR регистрирует отпуск и сотрудник получает уведомление об одобрении. Если отклонено - сотрудник получает уведомление об отказе. Сохрани в vacation.bpmn.
evals.expected_output: Valid BPMN 2.0 XML at vacation.bpmn with start event, approval task, exclusive gateway, approve/reject branches with conditions, HR registration + notify tasks, two distinct end events, complete auto-generated DI. Passes validate.
assertions: vacation.bpmn exists and parses as well-formed BPMN 2.0 (bpmn-moddle, no errors)
Has one start event and at least two end events (approved and rejected outcomes)
Contains an exclusive gateway for the approval decision
Includes the key activities: submit request, manager approval, HR registration, employee notification(s)
Approve/reject branches are distinguished by conditions or named sequence flows
Every flow node and sequence flow has diagram layout (BPMNShape/BPMNEdge present; passes validate)

evals.name: edit-add-payment-check
evals.prompt: В файле order.bpmn после шага 'Check stock' добавь проверку оплаты: если оплата прошла - продолжаем к 'Ship order'; если не прошла - заканчиваем новым концом 'Payment failed'. Перелейаудь схему и убедись, что она валидна.
evals.expected_output: order.bpmn updated with an exclusive gateway after Check stock, paid/not-paid branches with conditions, a new 'Payment failed' end event, existing ship path preserved. layout (default) preserves the existing DI and only places the new gateway/end/flows; validate passes.
assertions: Original flow preserved: start (Order received), Check stock, Ship order, and the 'Order shipped' end event are all still present
An exclusive gateway is added after Check stock for the payment decision (Check stock flows into the gateway, not directly to Ship)
A new end event labeled 'Payment failed' exists on the not-paid branch
Paid branch leads to Ship order; not-paid branch leads to Payment failed; branches use conditions or a default
Existing nodes keep their original positions (default layout preserves DI, not a from-scratch rebuild) and the new nodes/flows all get shapes/edges (validate passes)
File parses as valid BPMN 2.0

evals.name: create-order-fulfillment
evals.prompt: Смоделируй BPMN-схему обработки интернет-заказа и сохрани в order-fulfillment.bpmn: старт (заказ оформлен); параллельно резервирование товара и проверка оплаты, затем слияние; развилка оплата прошла? (нет -> Заказ отменен); упаковка отдельным под-процессом «Упаковка» (укомплектовать, взвесить, наклеить этикетку), затем отгрузка (-> Заказ отгружен); граничный таймер 1 день на резервировании -> эскалация менеджеру склада (-> Эскалировано).
evals.expected_output: Complex valid BPMN 2.0 (15+ nodes): parallel fork/join, exclusive payment gateway with cancel end, packaging sub-process, boundary timer + escalation, 3 distinct end events, complete clean DI with no overlapping shapes.
assertions: order-fulfillment.bpmn parses as well-formed BPMN 2.0
Has a parallel gateway fork and join around the concurrent reserve-stock and check-payment branches
Has an exclusive gateway for the payment decision with a cancel branch ('Заказ отменен' end)
Includes a packaging sub-process ('Упаковка') with inner steps
Boundary timer on the reserve-stock task leads to an escalation end ('Эскалировано')
Three or more distinct end states (отгружен, отменен, эскалировано)
Clean complete layout: every node/flow has DI AND zero overlapping node shapes (overlaps == 0)

evals.name: edit-preserve-subprocess
evals.prompt: В hiring.bpmn (экспорт из Camunda) внутри подпроцесса 'Interview loop' после 'Onsite interview' добавь задачу 'Reference check', затем перелэйаудь и провалидируй. Содержимое подпроцесса должно остаться на месте — оно не должно опустеть.
evals.expected_output: hiring.bpmn updated with a new 'Reference check' task inside the Interview loop sub-process after 'Onsite interview'. Default layout preserves the existing multi-diagram DI (the Interview drill-down page keeps Phone screen + Onsite interview and gains Reference check); the sub-process is NOT collapsed/emptied. validate passes.
assertions: The Interview loop sub-process still has its own drill-down BPMNDiagram plane (bpmnElement = Interview), not an empty box
Inner steps preserved: Phone screen and Onsite interview keep their shapes on the Interview plane
New 'Reference check' task added inside the sub-process, between Onsite interview and the inner end, and given a shape on the Interview plane
Top-level layout preserved: Screen CVs and the Interview box keep their original positions (used default layout, not --rebuild)
validate passes (every flow element has a shape; no per-plane overlaps); file parses as valid BPMN 2.0
Used the default non-destructive layout — did NOT regenerate the whole diagram from scratch

evals.name: create-collaboration
evals.prompt: Смоделируй взаимодействие двух участников и сохрани в support-collab.bpmn: Клиент создаёт обращение и отправляет его в Поддержку (сообщение), Поддержка обрабатывает обращение и отправляет ответ обратно Клиенту (сообщение). Два пула, обмен сообщениями между ними.
evals.expected_output: Valid BPMN 2.0 collaboration in support-collab.bpmn with two participants (pools), each with its own process, and message flows crossing between the pools. Both pools are laid out (every flow node has a shape) and stacked without overlapping; validate passes; lint reports no intra-pool message flow.
assertions: support-collab.bpmn parses as valid BPMN 2.0 with a bpmn:collaboration and two participants (pools)
At least one message flow connects the two pools (cross-pool, not within one)
Both pools' processes are laid out: every flow node in both processes has a BPMNShape (validate passes)
Each pool has its own BPMNShape and the two pools do not overlap
lint reports no INTERNAL MESSAGE FLOW (message flows cross pools)

evals.name: create-swimlanes
evals.prompt: Сделай схему с дорожками и сохрани в fulfilment-lanes.bpmn: три команды — Продажи (принять заказ), Склад (укомплектовать, упаковать), Доставка (отгрузить). Каждая задача в своей дорожке.
evals.expected_output: Valid BPMN 2.0 in fulfilment-lanes.bpmn with one process containing a laneSet of three lanes (Sales, Warehouse, Delivery); each task assigned to its lane via flowNodeRef; lane shapes drawn and nodes placed in their bands; validate passes; lint reports no unassigned node.
assertions: fulfilment-lanes.bpmn parses as valid BPMN 2.0 with a laneSet containing three lanes
Every task is assigned to a lane via flowNodeRef (lint reports no UNASSIGNED NODE)
Lane shapes are drawn and each node sits within its lane's vertical band (validate passes)
Tasks named in business terms; one start event and at least one end event

evals.name: edit-rename-preserve
evals.prompt: В order.bpmn переименуй задачу 'Check stock' в 'Verify availability' и перелэйаудь. Существующая раскладка должна сохраниться.
evals.expected_output: order.bpmn with the task renamed (same element id) and the diagram otherwise untouched: default layout preserves every existing shape's position (no --rebuild). validate passes.
assertions: The task formerly named 'Check stock' is now named 'Verify availability' (same element id)
Existing shapes keep their original x/y positions (default layout preserved the DI, not a from-scratch rebuild)
No flow elements were added or removed; validate passes
Used the default non-destructive layout, not --rebuild

evals.name: edit-insert-step
evals.prompt: В order.bpmn между 'Check stock' и 'Ship order' добавь шаг 'Pack order' и перелэйаудь.
evals.expected_output: order.bpmn with a new 'Pack order' task inserted on the path Check stock -> Pack order -> Ship order; existing nodes preserved; the new node placed onto the flow with a shape and edges; validate passes.
assertions: A new task 'Pack order' exists between Check stock and Ship order (Check stock -> Pack order -> Ship order)
Original nodes preserved: Order received, Check stock, Ship order, and the existing end event
The new node has a shape and is connected with edges; validate passes
Existing layout preserved (default layout); the new node is fitted onto the flow, not the whole diagram rebuilt

evals.name: edit-delete-branch
evals.prompt: В return.bpmn убери ветку эскалации по таймауту: граничное событие-таймер, шаг 'Escalate to support lead' и его конец 'Escalated'. Затем перелэйаудь и провалидируй.
evals.expected_output: return.bpmn with the escalation branch removed from semantics (boundary timer, escalate task, escalated end, and their connecting flows) and the corresponding shapes/edges pruned from the diagram. The remaining process is unchanged and keeps its positions; validate passes with no parse warnings.
assertions: The escalation branch is gone from semantics: the boundary timer event, the 'Escalate to support lead' task, and the 'Escalated' end event are removed
Their shapes and edges are pruned from the diagram (no dangling DI, no unresolved-reference parse warnings)
The rest of the process (inspect item, issue refund, reject, the 'Item intact?' decision) is unchanged and keeps its positions
validate passes; file parses as valid BPMN 2.0

evals.name: review-deadlock
evals.prompt: approval-buggy.bpmn где-то намертво виснет в Camunda после развилки по сумме. Найди причину и предложи фикс.
evals.expected_output: Identifies, via lint, an AND-join that merges branches from an exclusive (XOR) split, explains why it deadlocks (the parallel join waits for a token that never arrives), and proposes making the join an exclusive/inclusive gateway matching the split.
assertions: Runs lint rather than only eyeballing the XML
Identifies the deadlock: a parallel (AND) join merging branches that split at an exclusive (XOR) gateway
Explains in plain language why it hangs (the AND-join waits forever for a token that never comes)
Proposes a concrete fix: make the join an exclusive/inclusive gateway matching the split

evals.name: review-structure
evals.prompt: Отревьюй messy.bpmn — что не так со структурой процесса?
evals.expected_output: Via lint, reports the three structural problems and explains each: an unreachable node ('Legacy import'), a dead end ('Archive' with no outgoing flow), and an implicit split ('Triage' branching without a gateway).
assertions: Runs lint
Reports the unreachable node ('Legacy import' has no path from a start event)
Reports the dead end ('Archive' has no outgoing sequence flow)
Reports the implicit split ('Triage' has multiple outgoing flows but is not a gateway)
Explains each in plain language with a concrete fix

evals.name: review-collaboration
evals.prompt: Проверь collab-buggy.bpmn на корректность взаимодействия пулов и граничных событий.
evals.expected_output: Via lint, flags the message flow that stays within one pool (should be a sequence flow) and the boundary event attached to a gateway (boundary events may only attach to activities); explains both with fixes.
assertions: Runs lint
Flags the message flow that connects two nodes within the same pool
Flags the boundary event attached to a gateway (must attach to a task/sub-process/call activity)
Explains both issues and proposes concrete fixes

evals.name: diff-as-is-to-be
evals.prompt: Сравни process-v1.bpmn (как есть) и process-v2.bpmn (как будет) и расскажи простыми словами, что изменилось.
evals.expected_output: Uses diff and summarizes the delta in business language: 'Charge card' added, 'Gift wrap' removed, 'Ship' renamed to 'Pack and ship', and the flow after Check stock rerouted (now to Charge card).
assertions: Runs diff rather than comparing the XML by eye
Reports 'Charge card' was added
Reports 'Gift wrap' was removed
Reports 'Ship' was renamed to 'Pack and ship'
Reports the flow after Check stock was rerouted (now leads to Charge card)
Summarized in plain business language, not raw element ids

evals.name: find-locate
evals.prompt: В big-process.bpmn где находится шаг проверки личности и что идёт сразу после него?
evals.expected_output: Locates 'Verify identity' (via find or summarize, not by scrolling raw XML) and states its successor, 'Sign contract'.
assertions: Locates 'Verify identity' using find or summarize (not by reading raw XML)
States what follows it: 'Sign contract'
Answer grounded in the model (correct successor)

evals.name: validate-fix
evals.prompt: Открой broken-di.bpmn, проверь его и почини, чтобы он нормально открывался в модельере.
evals.expected_output: Runs validate, finds the broken layout (overlapping shapes), regenerates the diagram with layout --rebuild (since the existing DI is broken), and re-validates clean. Semantics are unchanged.
assertions: Runs validate and identifies the broken layout (overlapping shapes)
Fixes it by regenerating the layout (layout --rebuild, because the existing DI is broken, not just incomplete)
Re-runs validate and confirms it passes (no overlaps, every flow element has a shape)
Semantics unchanged: same nodes and flows as before
